[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000001 2
1 0001000 1
2 1001011 4
3 0100010 2
4 1110110 5
5 0000110 2
6 0000001 1
7 0010001 2

23 32 0000001 1 match 6
34 43 0010001 2 match 7

56 65 0001010 2
67 76 0001010 2
70 07 1010010 3

13 31 1100000 2
24 42 0000001 1 match 6
